---
title: "Scaling on Satisfaction"
subtitle: "Using OpenTelemetry and User Feedback to Drive Canary Deployments"
author:
  - Whitney Lee
  - Thomas Vitale
date: "2026-03-31"
---

## What We're Building

A live feedback loop where **audience votes** drive infrastructure decisions.

::: {.notes}
Welcome slide. Set context for what the audience will experience during this talk.
Two live demo rounds, interleaved with teaching scenes that pull back the curtain.
:::

## Architecture Overview

```{mermaid}
%%| fig-width: 10
flowchart LR
  A[Audience Votes] --> B[OTel Spans]
  B --> C[Collector]
  C --> D[Prometheus]
  D --> E[Flagger]
  E --> F[Traffic Split]
  F --> A
```

::: {.notes}
High-level feedback loop. Each component will get its own deep-dive scene later in the talk.
:::
